title: Stage 4: Master-Level Calculation (2100→2200+)
description: Stage 4 of the Chess99 Tactical Progression Trainer. The final stage — master-level forcing lines, defensive resources, and endgame precision.

intro.text: You've reached the final stage of the Chess99 Tactical Progression Trainer. At 2100+, the tactics are long — five, six, seven moves deep. Your opponent has defensive resources you must calculate and refute. One inaccuracy throws away the win. This is where discipline, depth, and pattern mastery converge.

segments.title: Long Forcing Lines — Calculate Everything
segments.text: At master level, a 'long' puzzle is 5-7 moves of precise play. Each move must be verified: does my opponent have a saving resource here? The method is: forcing moves first — checks, captures, direct threats — then quiet moves. Never stop one move short.

segments.title: Defensive Resources — Don't Stop Early
segments.text: The biggest mistake when calculating is stopping when you think you've found the win. Ask: 'what is my opponent's BEST reply?' At 2100+, they have counter-threats, perpetual checks, and unexpected defensive shots. Find these and calculate through them.

segments.title: Endgame Tactics — Precision is Everything
segments.text: Master-level endgame puzzles are won by tempo, triangulation, and promotion races. King activity, outside passed pawns, and the opposition — these are the weapons of the endgame tactician. A half-move miscalculation here is a loss, not a draw.

segments.title: The Method: Forcing Moves → Quiet Killer
segments.text: The structured approach: first list all checks, then all captures, then all threats. Eliminate the bad ones quickly. For the remaining candidates, calculate the longest forcing line. Often the winner is a quiet move at the END of the forcing sequence that creates a zugzwang or unstoppable threat.

Reaching 2200 is not about talent — it's about the quality of your calculation. Systematic, deep, disciplined thinking. The 500 Stage 4 puzzles on chess99.com are from the Lichess master database. Each one demands that you calculate longer and trust your analysis more. Good luck.
